_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Identify potential points of strength and vulnerability within a network.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI risk taxonomy, including model risk, algorithmic bias, opacity, adversarial vulnerability, data poisoning, training data integrity failures, and systemic AI failure modes.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AG domain. AG-K-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.411), SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.384).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.461). Shared vocabulary: [vulnerability]. DCWF-only terms [identify, network, points, potential, strength, within] vs WIDAI-only terms [adversarial, ai, algorithmic, bias, data, failure] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.883, R=0.843). P exceeds R by 0.041 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (92.2%). "Identify potential points of strength and vulnerability within a network." and "Knowledge of AI risk taxonomy, including model risk, algorithmic bias, opacity," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.412 ≈ STS 0.461 (gap 0.048). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [vulnerability] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.7%. Shared tokens: [vulnerability]. DCWF-only: [identify, network, points, potential, strength, within]. WIDAI-only: [adversarial, ai, algorithmic, bias, data, failure].
